title: Nano Banana Pro：用 Gemini 3 Pro 图像模型构建创意应用
author: Alisa Fortin
content:
Today, we’re releasing Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image), a higher-fidelity model built on Gemini 3 Pro for developers to access studio-quality image generation. This follows our release of Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image) just a few months ago. Since then, we’ve loved seeing the community put its key features to work — from character consistency to photo restoration, and even using its capabilities to make local edits in an infinite canvas.

This state-of-the-art image generation and editing model is starting to roll out in paid preview to build a new wave of intelligent, multimodal applications with the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Vertex AI for enterprises. This model unlocks high-fidelity images with higher accuracy in text rendering and robust world knowledge, supercharged by the model's ability to use grounding with Google Search to retrieve data based on the user's prompt.

We are also expanding the reach of Gemini 3 Pro Image across the developer ecosystem. In Google Antigravity — our new agentic development platform — coding agents can now directly leverage these image generation capabilities to generate detailed UI mockups for user review or even new visual assets before implementing in code. Additionally, leading creative platforms are integrating the model, including Adobe and Figma.

High fidelity and controls

If you’re building advanced tools that require precision, Gemini 3 Pro Image gives you control over the physics (lighting, camera, focus, color grading) and composition of the image to ensure professional-quality outputs.

With 2K and 4k resolution available, you can ensure outputs meet resolution standards required for professional production. Effortlessly create cohesive advertisements by combining diverse elements such as product images, logos, and references. Achieve consistent resemblance for up to five individuals, integrate six high-fidelity shots, or blend as many as fourteen standard inputs into a single, polished ad. Try our demo app that allows you to pair logos with products to create your own mockup designs.

       Demo app that brings product design to life with reference images. Sequences shortened.

Improved text rendering and localization

Gemini 3 Pro Image offers a significant leap forward from 2.5 Flash Image, transforming abstract image generation into functional assets. It excels in handling logic and language, and delivers state-of-the-art text rendering, producing clear, accurate text integrated in your images.

It's also an ideal solution for developing marketing collateral, educational content and numerous other applications. Try the model’s capabilities in our comic book generator app in Google AI Studio, where you can create original multi-page comic books featuring you and a friend, complete with advanced text rendering and stylization.

      Demo app that creates a comic book in your chosen language based on photos and selected genre. Sequences shortened.

With Gemini 3 Pro Image, we’ve removed the barrier between image generation and localization logic. This advanced model grasps the semantic context of an image, enabling effortless language changes on elements like menus, signs, or documents utilizing image-to-image generation keeping original artistic style or layout.

Access to the world’s knowledge

Gemini 3 Pro Image connects a vast knowledge base to produce more factual assets over previous image generation models. Additionally, when enabled, grounding with Google Search connects the model to real-time web content for data-driven outputs. This is particularly valuable for applications requiring precise representations, such as biological diagrams or historical maps. Try this for yourself with our demo app where you can dynamically create infographics on any topic tailored to your audience.

Go bananas and start building today

This new model release incorporates much of the input you have already shared with us, but we aren’t stopping here. To ensure clear provenance in AI-generated media, we have integrated SynthID digital watermarks directly into every image created or edited with Gemini 3 Pro Image to denote its AI-generated or edited origin.

Start by exploring our collection of apps that use Gemini 3 Pro Image to spark your imagination and see what’s possible. Once you’re inspired, remix these demo apps or integrate the model directly into your own projects via the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Vertex AI for enterprise use. For technical details along the way, check out the documentation, prompt guide, cookbook or visit the developer forum to get help and share feedback.
aiSummary: 谷歌发布 Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro 图像)，一款具备高级文本渲染、世界知识基础以及强大开发者工具的高保真图像生成和编辑模型。
oneSentenceSummary: 谷歌发布 Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro 图像)，一款具备高级文本渲染、世界知识基础以及强大开发者工具的高保真图像生成和编辑模型。
summary: 谷歌发布了 Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro 图像)，这是一款基于 Gemini 3 Pro 的新型图像生成和编辑模型。目前，开发者可以付费预览版体验。它强调了该模型能够生成具有更高文本渲染准确性和强大世界知识的录音室质量图像，并通过谷歌搜索提供的事实依据进行增强。主要功能包括对图像物理和构图的精细控制，支持 2K 和 4K 分辨率，以及一致的角色呈现效果。该模型显著提升了文本渲染和本地化能力，能够理解图像中文字变化的语义信息。该模型还与 Google Antigravity 等开发者平台，以及 Adobe 和 Figma 等创意工具深度集成。开发者可以通过 Gemini API、Google AI Studio 和 Vertex AI 访问 Nano Banana Pro，SynthID 数字水印技术可确保图像的来源可追溯。它是之前发布的 Gemini 2.5 Flash Image 的更高质量、更高成本的替代品。

mainPoints.point: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro 图像) 提供具备高级控制的高保真录音室级图像生成能力。
mainPoints.explanation: 该模型提供对图像物理和构图的精确控制，支持高分辨率 (2K/4K)，并确保一致的输出，以满足专业制作需求和创意应用。

mainPoints.point: 该模型显著提升了文本渲染和本地化能力，将抽象的图像生成转化为实用的功能性素材。
mainPoints.explanation: 它擅长在图像中集成清晰、准确的文本，并理解语义上下文，从而能够在视觉元素上轻松进行语言更改，这对于营销和教育内容至关重要。

mainPoints.point: Gemini 3 Pro 图像利用谷歌搜索技术，增强了生成结果的事实准确性，并能访问实时的世界知识。
mainPoints.explanation: 此功能使该模型能够生成数据驱动的输出，使其对于需要精确表示的应用（如生物图或历史地图）具有价值，从而提高了可靠性。

mainPoints.point: 该模型已深度集成到谷歌更广泛的开发者生态系统和领先的创意平台中，从而扩展了其实际应用和覆盖范围。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过与 Google Antigravity、Adobe 和 Figma 的集成，开发者和创意专业人士可以利用 Gemini 3 Pro 图像完成 UI 模型和视觉资产生成等任务。这有助于推动新一代多模态应用的发展。

keyQuotes: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro 图像) 是一款基于 Gemini 3 Pro 构建的高保真模型，旨在为开发者提供录音室级别的图像生成能力。
这款先进的图像生成和编辑模型现已推出付费预览版。开发者可以使用 Google AI Studio 中的 Gemini API 和面向企业的 Vertex AI，构建新一代智能多模态应用。
Gemini 3 Pro 图像相比 2.5 Flash Image 有了显著提升，能够将抽象的图像生成转化为实用的功能性素材。
Gemini 3 Pro 图像消除了图像生成与本地化处理之间的壁垒。
为了确保 AI 生成内容的来源清晰可追溯，所有通过 Gemini 3 Pro 图像创建或编辑的图像都集成了 SynthID 数字水印，以标明其 AI 生成或编辑的属性。
使用 Gemini 2.5 Flash Image 进行更快、更低成本的图像生成，或使用 3 Pro 图像 进行更高质量的图像生成，但成本和延迟更高。
